entry.title: New: RES24-288 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF ONE (1) HIGH-BACK TRADITIONAL BENCH, PREPARATIONS OF THE GROUNDS, AND A BRONZE PLAQUE WITH AN INSCRIPTION TO READ “DONATED BY THE FAMILY OF ELMA MAXWELL AND SHIRLEY BAILEY,” VALUED AT $2,585.67 TO THE CITY FROM MARILYN MAGNESS TO BE INSTALLED AT KAILUA BEACH PARK.

Latest action: Adopted.

View on the council site
